creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
I have upgraded the port to SVN revision 1379, with assistance of bapt@ and Harrison Grundy. Note that the distcache files may not yet have propagated to the mirrors, this should happen in the next few hours.

Since I do not have real-world LDAP, a.ulasov (or others), please test and report back if it works now.

To build the port, you need to specify "make TRYBROKEN=yes" after upgrading.
